response:
I'm excited to share the proposed shooting schedule with you. We've managed to fit all the necessary scenes into a tight 8-day shoot, spanning from Day 1 to Day 8. Here's a breakdown of what we'll be capturing each day: 

Day 1 will take us to the downtown high-rise office, followed by a flight on Day 2. We'll then spend two nights at the Paper Street House, filming the living room and kitchen scenes. The next few days will take us to various exterior locations, including a dive bar and Dean's apartment building. We'll wrap up with two nights of interior shoots at the basement bar and support group church basement.

I'm pleased to report that we were able to stick to all the original constraints, ensuring that our schedule meets all the necessary requirements. The total cost for this schedule comes in at $8,450.00, which is well within our budget of $999,999.00. This schedule offers a great balance of efficiency and creativity, and I'm confident that it will help us bring our vision to life. I think this is a great plan, and I'm looking forward to working with you to make it a reality.
